violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025

Raw animal foods (shelled eggs and sausage) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (bagged lettuce and container of spaghetti sauce) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was (0) parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025
Shredded cheese observed being stored in a cardboard box. PIC instructed to place cheese in food grade container and cease practice. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025
